```xml
                     hasVisualFeature([yellow_green_center]).

    <!-- Class 45 (Bright orange/yellow flowers, tubular shape, red spots) -->
    [Class_45] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_yellow_color]) and
                     hasVisualFeature([tubular_petals]) and
                     hasVisualFeature([red_spots]).

    <!-- Class 77 (Large white/pink flowers, broad petals, smooth edges, yellow center) -->
    [Class_77] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([large_white_pink_color]) and
                     hasVisualFeature([broad_petals]) and
                     hasVisualFeature([smooth_petals]) and
                     hasVisualFeature([yellow_center]).

    hasVisualFeature(Target, [deep_purple_color]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [multiple_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [ruffled_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [yellow_green_center]).
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits the following observable visual features:
    - Deep purple coloration (matches [deep_purple_color]).
    - Multiple petals (matches [multiple_petals]).
    - Ruffled petal edges (matches [ruffled_petals]).
    - A yellow/green center (matches [yellow_green_center]).

    These features align with the TBox axioms for [Class_44], which requires all four properties to be present. The Target Image does not match the bright orange/yellow tubular flowers with red spots (Class 45) nor the large white/pink broad-petaled flowers with smooth edges (Class 77). Therefore, the Target Image satisfies the necessary and sufficient conditions for [Class_44].
</dl_explanation>

<response>44</response>
```

```xml
                      hasVisualFeature([yellow_center_stamen]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([broad_petals_with_smooth_edges]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([water_or_leafy_background]);

</dl_explanation>

<response>44</response>
```

```xml
    [Class88] equiv hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_or_red_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([prominent_yellow_center]) and hasVisualFeature([rounded_petals])

</tbox>
```

```xml
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [prominent_stamen])
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [large_petals])
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [elongated_or_tubular_shape])
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits bright red coloration and large petals with a prominent stamen, matching the visual features of Class 81 (clematis-like flowers) in the provided examples. However, the elongated/tubular shape and bright red coloration are not fully aligned with the typical pink/purple coloration of Class 81.

    The Target Image does not match Class 34 (spiky central disk, blue/white coloration), Class 88 (bright orange/red with yellow center and rounded petals), or Class 71 (soft pink/red, delicate textured petals, clustered flowers).

    The closest match based on the provided examples and observable features is Class 81, as the prominent stamen and large petals are visually similar, despite the color difference. The elongated petal shape is a distinctive feature of this flower type.
</dl_explanation>

<response>81</response>
```

```xml
<tbox>
    <!-- Class 34 (e.g., thistle-like flowers) -->
    [Class_34] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([spiky_center]) and hasVisualFeature([petals_with_blue_or_purple_tints]) and hasVisualFeature([multiple_flower_heads_clustering]);

    <!-- Class 81 (e.g., clematis-like flowers) -->
    [Class_81] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([large_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([prominent_stamen_center]) and hasVisualFeature([petals_with_pink_or_purple_gradient]);

    <!-- Class 88 (e.g., nasturtium-like flowers) -->
    [Class_88] equiv hasVisualFeature([bright_yellow_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([dark_red_or_orange_center_spots]) and hasVisualFeature([rounded_petals]);

    <!-- Class 71 (e.g., azalea-like flowers) -->
    [Class_71] equiv hasVisualFeature([petals_with_pink_or_light_purple_tints]) and hasVisualFeature([smooth_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([delicate_stamen_center]) and hasVisualFeature([multiple_flowers_on_stem]);
</tbox>

<abox>
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [large_petals]);
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [prominent_stamen_center]);
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [petals_with_pink_or_purple_gradient]);
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits large petals and a prominent stamen center, which aligns with the sufficient conditions for [Class_81].
    The petals also show a pink gradient, matching the visual features of Class 81 (clematis-like flowers).
    The absence of spiky centers, bright yellow petals, or dark red/orange spots rules out Classes 34, 88, and 71.
    Thus, the Target Image satisfies the necessary and sufficient conditions for [Class_81].
</dl_explanation>

<response>81</response>
```

```xml
    [Class_34] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([spiky_center]) and hasVisualFeature([petals_with_blue_or_purple_tints]) and hasVisualFeature([multiple_flower_heads_clustering]).

    <!-- Class 81 (e.g., clematis) -->
    [Class_81] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([large_single_flower]) and hasVisualFeature([deep_petal_layers]) and hasVisualFeature([prominent_stamen_in_center]) and hasVisualFeature([color_variation_from_purple_to_pink_or_red]).

    <!-- Class 88 (e.g., nasturtium) -->
    [Class_88] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([bright_yellow_or_orange_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([dark_red_or_brown_veining]) and hasVisualFeature([rounded_petal_shape]) and hasVisualFeature([green_leafy_background]).

    <!-- Class 71 (e.g., azalea) -->
    [Class_71] equiv hasVisualFeature([soft_pink_or_light_purple_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([delicate_textured_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([green_stem_and_leaves]) and hasVisualFeature([multiple_flowers_in_cluster]).
</tbox>

<abox>
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [soft_pink_or_light_purple_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [delicate_textured_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [green_stem_and_leaves]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [multiple_flowers_in_cluster]).
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits soft pink petals, delicate texture, green stems and leaves, and appears to have multiple flowers in a cluster. These features directly match the necessary and sufficient conditions for [Class_71] as defined in the TBox. The combination of these visual features aligns with the observed characteristics of azalea flowers in the provided examples.
</dl_explanation>

<response>71</response>
```

<features>
- Flower with 8 broad, pointed star-shaped petals (tepals)
- Deep magenta/pink petal color with visible subtle vein lines on petals
- Central cluster of light-colored, spiky stamens surrounding a lighter central disc
- Green garden foliage background
</features>
<kb>
- IF flower has 8+ pointed petal-like tepals, central spiky stamen cluster, and rich pink/magenta petals THEN class 81
- IF flower has yellow, drooping iridaceous (iris-style) petals THEN class 14
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the first rule for class 81: it has 8 broad, pointed magenta petals with visible veins, plus a central light-colored spiky stamen cluster, exactly matching the visual pattern of the 81-labeled examples (the clematis flowers from earlier prompts). It does not match the yellow iris form of class 14.
</rule_check>
<response>81</response>

</rule_check>
<response>44</response>
